mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menu WHERE state = '1' ORDER BY menuId
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE pid = #{pid} AND state = '1' ORDER BY menuId
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE menuId = #{id} AND state = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu WHERE state = '1'

SELECT * FROM menu WHERE state = '1'
AND menuName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{menuname}, '%')
ORDER BY menuId
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE pid = #{pid} AND state = '1' ORDER BY menuId
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.menuId = rm.menuId INNER JOIN emp_role er ON rm.roleId = er.roleId WHERE er.empId = #{eid} AND m.state = '1' ORDER BY m.menuId
